projects.title: Enablrsales — eDetailing Platform
projects.content:
Enablrsales.com is a cloud-based eDetailing platform built to support modern sales teams with structured, high-performance digital workflows. I contributed to frontend and backend feature development using PHP, HTML, and CSS within an Agile team environment.

The platform is used in real-world field scenarios, where reliability and performance are critical. My work focused on building production-ready features, refining UI interactions, and ensuring stable releases across sprint cycles.

This project strengthened my ability to work on live systems, collaborate with stakeholders, and deliver features that directly impact business operations.
projects.summary: A cloud-based sales enablement platform designed to streamline eDetailing workflows and empower field sales teams with reliable digital tools.
projects.problem: Sales teams needed a reliable digital platform to deliver product presentations in the field. Existing processes were inconsistent, difficult to scale, and not optimized for real-world usage conditions.
projects.solution: Helped build a cloud-based eDetailing platform that enables structured content delivery, improves workflow efficiency, and ensures consistent performance across devices used by field teams.
features: Dynamic content delivery for sales presentations
Modular feature releases aligned with sprint cycles
highlights: Delivered production features used by real sales teams
Worked in Agile sprint cycles with consistent releases
Collaborated with stakeholders to refine requirements
challenges: Balancing speed of delivery with code quality
impact: Improved reliability of digital sales workflows
Enabled faster content delivery for field teams
Supported scaling across multiple users and teams
learnings: Building reliable systems for real-world usage
Maintaining clean code in long-term projects
Balancing business needs with technical constraints
